sub_modules.dct_coeff_rom: Combinational fixed-point DCT/IDCT coefficient ROM using a Q14 orthonormal 8-point transform matrix and its transpose.
sub_modules.dct_mac8: Combinational eight-lane signed multiply-accumulate datapath for one transform output coefficient.
sub_modules.dct_round_clip: Combinational Q14 rounding, scaling, and saturation to the requested output width.
